floor_history.headline: fable-blitz recon: volatile casts are LOAD-BEARING (judge measured 0->6 on removal); target loop keeps THREE induction vars (counter t1, ptr v1, offset t0) + mixed addressing (symbolic sb a0,g_disp_fb

frontier.hypothesis: UNMEASURED (first, cheap): strip the four volatile casts, sandbox, and objdump-diff the 6 divergent insns against target to identify WHICH pass moves - IV-merge (offset t0 disappears), LICM (lui hoisted above the loop head), or sched (sb order shuffles); the diff shape picks the technique slug
frontier.mechanism: loop.c strength-reduction/IV elimination vs loop.c LICM vs sched.c store reordering - each produces a distinguishable byte signature
frontier.next_probe: edit out the vu8 casts, run sandbox disp_SetFramebufferMode --disable all (expect ~6), objdump tmp .o and classify the diff

frontier.hypothesis: UNMEASURED: if the diff is IV-merge/LICM, serialize the flag store's address chain: keep a SECOND walked u8* flag_ptr = (u8 *)&g_disp_fb_flag; ... *flag_ptr = a0; flag_ptr += 0x4090; - a real second induction variable that loop.c must keep (walking-pointer family, store variant), reproducing the t0-indexed symbolic store without volatile
frontier.mechanism: a live pointer IV with its own increment is not eliminable by loop.c IV-merge because its base is a different symbol; matches target's two parallel 0x4090-stepped registers
frontier.next_probe: sandbox the two-walking-pointers form; if the symbolic lui/addu/%lo(at) macro shape is lost (GCC emits plain sb 0(reg)), fall back to (&g_disp_fb_flag)[offset] = a0 array-index spelling to force the symbol+index mem

frontier.hypothesis: UNMEASURED: if the diff is store-order scheduling, fix order without volatile via dependence: make the a1/a2/a3 stores address-dependent on the a0 store's pointer chain (e.g. write all four through one walked pointer with post-increments) per walking-pointer-serializes-parallel-loads
frontier.mechanism: address dependence through a serially-updated pointer forbids sched.c from lifting later stores across earlier ones
frontier.next_probe: sweep 3-4 candidate spellings with sweep_variants against the 16-insn target region

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Active volatile coercion via *(vu8 *) casts on non-allowlisted game RAM globals; removing casts raises sandbox score 0→6; the volatile_cheats detector never caught this *(vu8 *)(ptr + N) spelling. Worker must find the pure-C scheduling/structure solution that matches without volatile.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
